name: ChatGPT
use_case: Draft articles, summarize research, brainstorm outlines, and create reusable content workflows.
best_for: Content teams, creators, operators, and small business owners.
pricing_note: Paid plans may unlock higher limits and advanced features.

name: Claude
use_case: Long-form writing, document analysis, editorial review, and content improvement.
best_for: Writers, analysts, researchers, and editorial workflows.
pricing_note: Paid plans may offer higher usage limits.

name: Zapier
use_case: Connect apps, automate lead routing, send alerts, and build no-code business workflows.
best_for: Small teams that need quick app-to-app automation.
pricing_note: Pricing often depends on tasks, apps, and advanced workflow needs.

name: Make
use_case: Build visual automation scenarios for operations, content systems, and reporting workflows.
best_for: Operators who want flexible workflow logic and visual scenario building.
pricing_note: Pricing often depends on operations and scenario usage.

name: Notion AI
use_case: Organize notes, create knowledge bases, summarize docs, and manage internal content systems.
best_for: Teams that already use Notion for documentation and planning.
pricing_note: AI features may require an add-on or paid workspace plan.

name: Perplexity
use_case: Research topics, compare sources, summarize web information, and prepare article briefs.
best_for: Researchers, writers, and operators who need faster topic discovery.
pricing_note: Paid plans may add advanced search and higher usage limits.

name: Surfer SEO
use_case: Optimize article structure, content depth, keyword coverage, and on-page SEO recommendations.
best_for: Content sites that want SEO-focused writing workflows.
pricing_note: Paid plans are typically based on content volume and features.

name: Intercom
use_case: Manage customer support conversations, automate replies, and route users to helpful answers.
best_for: SaaS, service businesses, and teams with active customer support needs.
pricing_note: Pricing can vary by seats, usage, and support features.
